hero.title: A Journey Inside Egypt
hero.subtitle: Enjoy an unforgettable journey through the land of civilization, with programs designed just for you

about.title: About us
about.intro: “Erith” is a leading platform specialized in knowledge-driven travel experiences that revive awareness of heritage
about.vision: Vision: to be the leading reference for knowledge- and identity-based tourism, turning Egypt from a conventional destination into an inspiring journey of discovery
about.mission: Mission: to empower travelers and enthusiasts to explore Egypt's true heritage through accurate information and excellent organization

stat1.caption: happy clients who shared their adventures discovering Egypt

stat2.caption: completed successfully to the highest standards of quality and safety

stat3.caption: covering Egypt's finest cities from Nubia to the North Coast

stat4.caption: of experience organizing tours inside Egypt

dest1.title: Elephantine Island
dest1.text: In the middle of the Nile at Aswan, Elephantine was once an important religious and trade center and a southern frontier fortress. It is known for monuments such as the Temple of Khnum and the Nilometer, and for its lively Nubian villages

dest2.title: The Nubian Village
dest2.text: More than a place to live, it is a living embodiment of an ancient people's history and culture — carrying a unique authenticity and heritage worth exploring and appreciating

dest3.title: Abu Simbel Temple
dest3.text: A masterpiece carved into rock by order of Ramses II in Nubia. It embodies the grandeur of ancient Egypt and humanity's feat in rescuing it from flooding — a great symbol of ancient Egyptian civilization

aswan.title: The Story of Aswan
aswan.caption: Footage from our journeys into the heart of Nubia

reviews.title: Our clients shared exceptional moments discovering the true heritage of Egypt

r1.name: Abu Salem
r1.text: Excellent organization and a complete program — the Nubian village visit especially

r2.name: Ben Najah
r2.text: The magic of Philae temple is indescribable, and the Nubian village with its colors

r3.name: Hakim Ziyech
r3.text: The trip was very well organized, and waking up to the Nile view was a dream come true

r4.name: Abdullah Ahmed
r4.text: From welcome to farewell everything was perfect — the Nubian food tasted incredible

explore.title: Explore Egypt
explore.subtitle: From the temples of the south to the northern shores — glimpses of the finest the land of civilization has to offer

abuSimbel.title: Abu Simbel
abuSimbel.caption: Two temples carved into rock, guarding Egypt's south for millennia

philae.title: Pharaonic Temple
philae.caption: Reliefs and columns telling the tales of the gods by the Nile

balloons.title: Luxor Balloons

qaitbay.title: Qaitbay Citadel
qaitbay.caption: A Mamluk fortress standing guard over the Alexandria sea

azhar.title: Al-Azhar Mosque
azhar.caption: A beacon of learning and a minaret glowing in historic Cairo

montaza.title: Montaza Palace
montaza.caption: Royal gardens and a palace overlooking the Mediterranean in Alexandria

toutankhamun.title: Tutankhamun's Treasures
toutankhamun.caption: A golden mask that captures the splendor of pharaonic Egypt

ibnTulun.title: Ibn Tulun Mosque
ibnTulun.caption: Cairo's oldest mosque with its unique spiral minaret
